About the Awards
The SBID International Interior Design Awards

The SBID International Design Awards has firmly established itself as one of the most prestigious interior design Awards in the global design calendar. 

This Award for design standards attracts entries from across the world, making it truly an honour and a sign of industry recognition that is second to none for the deserving winners.

Judging
The 3-tier judging process ensures that all entries are carefully scrutinised for technical standards and creative calibre

The Awards attract entries from around the world, representing every continent. The international nature of the competition means judges and voters are able to choose from a wide field, both in terms of types of project, scale, value and creative inspiration. FAQs
How much does it cost to enter? 

1. Early Bird Rate |  Entry Period: 2 March – 31 March 2026  |  £250

2. Standard Rate  |  Entry Period: 31 March – 29 May 2026  |  £275

3. Extended Rate  |  Entry Period: 29 May – 26 June 2026  |  £325

All entry periods close at 5pm BST. There is a one-off £50 admin fee that is applicable to all entries. This is charged per entrant, not per submission. All prices listed exclude VAT.
